title: Turn marketing emails organization wide
excerpt: Can we please turn marketing emails organization wide as in I dont want end users to receive any marketing emails from monday.com. When a company has many SaaS tools and each one of them is sending marketing emails, it g…

posts.author: supreet (supreet kaur)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we please turn marketing emails organization wide as in I dont want end users to receive any marketing emails from monday.com. When a company has many SaaS tools and each one of them is sending marketing emails, it generates spam and a clogged inbox.
